If you own a local business like a store or restaurant or something similar, and you want to get customers from the internet, this video is going to show you how to be in front of people who are actively looking to buy what you're selling without you having to have your business ranked or listed in the search engines or anything like that. By the way, the research I'm sharing with you actually comes from a company called C3metrics and they're getting the data from Mielsen, the very same people that do all the TV research and stuff. So the average person who starts the buying cycle, it actually takes them 22 days to actually end up buying the thing they're thinking about. So here's what usually happens. You, me, or prospects, whoever will go and will do a search for something, right? And we'll be like, okay, and we'll like click on a website, maybe two or three websites from what we find in that Google search, we'll go to the site and then the person leaves and then maybe they go to another site and then they leave that site and they might read it for a while and they leave it and then a couple of days pass by and then they might go and they might start checking out reviews of the product that they're interested in or whatever and then they might go back to the site or go to a different site or whatever and then they might leave that site and a couple more days pass and then they finally end up buying. And research shows, this is research compiled with the help of Mielsen, not really big company, it shows that the average person, it takes 22 days for them to go through this cycle.
